channel.title: China on Doc B — This Timeline
channel.description: Recent content in China on Doc B — This Timeline

item.title: Every Machine in China's Battery Line Is Chinese
item.description: Gotion's 620-mile solid-state battery hits 90% yield while Northvolt and three European factories go bankrupt in a single quarter

item.title: The 10,700-Ton Hole in Glencore's Cobalt Supply
item.description: DRC export quotas forced the world's largest cobalt trader to source from Chinese exchange warehouses — and the Wuxi stockpile is draining

item.title: Export Controls Created the Efficiency They Feared Most
item.description: Alibaba's Qwen hit 700 million downloads running on MacBooks. Chinese AI went from 1% to 30% of global workloads in a year. The chip restriction didn't gate competition — it optimized it.

item.title: Huawei Built the Processor. Henan Can't Plug It In.
item.description: Export controls froze China at 7nm — and may have accidentally synchronised China's chip and grid timelines

item.title: The Slurry Problem
item.description: China's antimony and tungsten export controls are reaching Intel's fab floor through a liquid nobody talks about

item.title: The Pentagon Has 60 Days of Rare Earths Left
item.description: PLA purges narrow China's coercive toolkit — leaving rare earth export controls as the one weapon that requires no command chain integrity
